Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPUTLS ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Resources Search Utilities ;7/12/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERAN PLATFORM;**19**;Jul 15, 2017;Build 1 ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; Q ; PAGING(RECCNT,PAGING) ;implements paging Q:RECCNT<1 N CNT,DVPPRV,DVPNXT,DVPFST,DVPLST ;paging Structure with prev, next, first and last OR recCount (if _count=0) ;RSTART Record start ;REND Record end ;RCNT Record count ; I $P($G(QUERYPAR("_count")),U)']"",$P($G(QUERYPAR("page")),U)']"" D Q . S PAGING("RSTART")=1,PAGING("REND")=RECCNT S PAGING("RCNT")=RECCNT I $P($G(QUERYPAR("_count")),U)="" S QUERYPAR("_count")="",$P(QUERYPAR("_count"),U,1)="1" I $P($G(QUERYPAR("_count")),U)="0" D Q . ;count=0, return only record count . S PAGING("paging","recCount")=PAGING("RCNT"),(PAGING("RSTART"),PAGING("REND"))=0 ;count>0, no page #, return first page only I $P($G(QUERYPAR("_count")),U)'="",+$P($G(QUERYPAR("_count")),U)>0,+$P($G(QUERYPAR("page")),U)=0 D Q . S PAGING("RSTART")=1,PAGING("REND")=+$P(QUERYPAR("_count"),U) ;standard paging ;compute total pages S DVPLST=PAGING("RCNT")\+$P($G(QUERYPAR("_count")),U) S:PAGING("RCNT")#+$P($G(QUERYPAR("_count")),U)>0 DVPLST=DVPLST+1 ;check (and fix)limits I $P(QUERYPAR("page"),U)>DVPLST D Q . S PAGING("OO")=1 . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","value","MSG_PARAM_INVALID","Parameter: 'page' has an invalid value. Select a value between 1 and "_DVPLST,"PAGING^DVPUTLS") ;page limits S DVPFST=1 S:$P(QUERYPAR("page"),U)<DVPLST DVPNXT=$P(QUERYPAR("page"),U)+1 S:$P(QUERYPAR("page"),U)>=DVPLST DVPNXT=DVPLST S:$P(QUERYPAR("page"),U)>1 DVPPRV=$P(QUERYPAR("page"),U)-1 S:$P(QUERYPAR("page"),U)=1 DVPPRV=1 ;compute START and END S PAGING("RSTART")=$P(QUERYPAR("page"),U)-1*+$P(QUERYPAR("_count"),U)+1 S:$P(QUERYPAR("page"),U)*$P(QUERYPAR("_count"),U)>PAGING("RCNT") PAGING("REND")=PAGING("RCNT") S:$P(QUERYPAR("page"),U)*$P(QUERYPAR("_count"),U)<=PAGING("RCNT") PAGING("REND")=PAGING("RSTART")+$P(QUERYPAR("_count"),U)-1 ;create pagin structure S PAGING("paging","prev")=DVPPRV,PAGING("paging","next")=DVPNXT S PAGING("paging","first")=DVPFST,PAGING("paging","last")=DVPLST Q ; MRGPGNG ; Merges the pagins, based on the passed parameters I $P($G(QUERYPAR("page")),U)'="",+$P($G(QUERYPAR("_count")),U)>0 M @TARGET@("results","paging")=PAGING("paging") I $P($G(QUERYPAR("_count")),U)="0" M @TARGET@("results","recCount")=PAGING("paging","recCount") Q DTCMPR(PARDT,VISTADT,MOD) ;Function. Compares the two dates using the MOD operator ;Returns: -1: parameter error 0: condition not satisfied (nok) 1: condition satisfied (ok) ; ;If PARDT is only date, we compare dates only ;If PARDT contains time, than we try to compare both ; N OP,FND,RSLT S FND=0,MOD=$$LOW^XLFSTR(MOD),RSLT=0 S OP="" F OP="eq","ne","lt","gt","ge","le" S:MOD=OP FND=1 Q:'FND -1 ; ;extract the DATE & time from both params S PARDT("TIME")=$F(PARDT,".") D:PARDT("TIME")'=0 .S PARDT("DATE")=$E(PARDT,1,PARDT("TIME")-2),PARDT("TIME")=$E(PARDT,PARDT("TIME"),100) S:PARDT("TIME")=0 PARDT("DATE")=PARDT,PARDT("TIME")=0 S VISTADT("TIME")=$F(VISTADT,".") D:VISTADT("TIME")'=0 .S VISTADT("DATE")=$E(VISTADT,1,VISTADT("TIME")-2),VISTADT("TIME")=$E(VISTADT,VISTADT("TIME"),100) S:VISTADT("TIME")=0 VISTADT("DATE")=VISTADT,VISTADT("TIME")=0 ; ;EQ I MOD="eq" D Q RSLT . I PARDT("TIME")'="" S:PARDT("DATE")=VISTADT("DATE") RSLT=1 Q . S:PARDT=VISTADT RSLT=1 ; ;NE I MOD="ne" D Q RSLT . I PARDT("TIME")'="" S:PARDT("DATE")'=VISTADT("DATE") RSLT=1 Q . S:PARDT'=VISTADT RSLT=1 ; ;LT I MOD="lt" D Q RSLT . I PARDT("TIME")'="" S:VISTADT("DATE")<PARDT("DATE") RSLT=1 Q . S:VISTADT<PARDT RSLT=1 ; ;GT I MOD="gt" D Q RSLT . I PARDT("TIME")'="" S:PARDT("DATE")<VISTADT("DATE") RSLT=1 Q . S:PARDT<VISTADT RSLT=1 ; ;LE I MOD="le" D Q RSLT . I PARDT("TIME")'="" S:VISTADT("DATE")<=PARDT("DATE") RSLT=1 Q . S:VISTADT<=PARDT RSLT=1 ; ;GE I MOD="ge" D Q RSLT . I PARDT("TIME")'="" S:PARDT("DATE")<=VISTADT("DATE") RSLT=1 Q . S:PARDT<=VISTADT RSLT=1 ; Q -1 ; CLNPARAM ;Clean out query parameters N PAR S PAR="" F S PAR=$O(QUERYPAR(PAR)) Q:PAR="" D . I $G(QUERYPAR(PAR))="^^" K QUERYPAR(PAR) Q . S $P(QUERYPAR(PAR),U,2)=$$LOW^XLFSTR($P(QUERYPAR(PAR),U,2)) . S $P(QUERYPAR(PAR),U,3)=$$LOW^XLFSTR($P(QUERYPAR(PAR),U,3)) Q ; PATCHECK(ICN,CALLER) ; Checks the ICN validity, populate DFN and return OO eventual errors. ; Returns: 1: OK 0: NOK (with populated OO) I DFN="",ICN="" D Q 0 . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Patient Identifier is required.",CALLER) I DFN="",ICN]"" S DFN=$$GETDFN^MPIF001(ICN) I +DFN<1 D Q 0 . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","not-found","MSG_NO_MATCH","No patient found for ICN: "_ICN,CALLER) I DFN,ICN="" S ICN=$$GETICN^MPIF001(DFN) I '$D(^DPT(DFN,0)) D Q 0 . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","Patient DFN: "_DFN_" is undefined",CALLER) Q 1 ; RPC2GLBL(RPC,GLBL) ; Converts a RPC returned JSON array into a global array N I,Y,JSON,CNT S I="",CNT=0 F S I=$O(@RPC@(I)) Q:I="" D . I $G(@RPC@(I))'="" S CNT=CNT+1,JSON(CNT)=$G(@RPC@(I)) . I $D(@RPC@(I))>=10 S Y="" F S Y=$O(@RPC@(I,Y)) Q:Y="" D . . I $G(@RPC@(I,Y))'="" S CNT=CNT+1,JSON(CNT)=$G(@RPC@(I,Y)) D DECODE^VPRJSON("JSON", GLBL) I $D(^TMP("VPRJERR",$J)) Q 0 Q 1 ; PRSIDENT(EXTID) ; Parse the identifier parameter and populate the passed EXTID("SYSTEM") and EXTID("CODE) according ; Additionally it checks "system" against the passed list EXTID("SYSTEMS",n) N FND,IX S FND=0,IX="" S EXTID=$P($G(QUERYPAR("identifier")),U) I $P(EXTID,"|",2)'="" S EXTID("SYSTEM")=$P(EXTID,"|"),EXTID("CODE")=$P(EXTID,"|",2) E D . I ($P(EXTID,":",2)="va")!(+EXTID) S EXTID("CODE")=EXTID . I $P(EXTID,":",2)'="va",+EXTID=0 S EXTID("SYSTEM")=EXTID I $D(EXTID("SYSTEM")) D I FND=0 D BADSYSOO Q 0 . F S IX=$O(EXTID("SYSTEMS",IX)) Q:IX="" D . . I EXTID("SYSTEM")=EXTID("SYSTEMS",IX) S FND=1 Q Q 1 BADSYSOO ; N SYS,CNT S (SYS,CNT)="" F S CNT=$O(EXTID("SYSTEMS",CNT)) Q:CNT="" D . S SYS=SYS_EXTID("SYSTEMS",CNT)_" " D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","value","MSG_PARAM_INVALID","Parameter identifier [system]|[code] pair: [system]: "_EXTID("SYSTEM")_" is not a valid value. Supported values are: "_SYS,"SRCHVS^DVPVS2") Q
